reasoning: As of October 2025, 2025 is on pace to be the 2nd or 3rd warmest year on record, falling behind 2023 and 2024. While January 2025 was the warmest on record, the subsequent months have consistently trailed 2024. The summer months (June-August) ranked as the third warmest on record, and September 2025 was also the third warmest globally. In June 2025, NOAA gave a <1% chance of 2025 being the warmest year on record. Given this comprehensive and highly reliable climate data spanning three-quarters of the year, it is virtually impossible for 2025 to surpass 2024's record anomaly. I assign a probability of 0.02 (the lower bound).
